infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Scan patient wristband QR codes to derive the encounter session key for memory-oracle retrieval. The camera is not used for any other purpose. No images are stored.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Verify clinician identity before deriving the session key. Face ID confirms you are authorized to access this patient's memory namespace.

plugins.cameraPermission: Scan patient wristband QR to begin an encounter
